name: Nestor Rectangle Acacia Dining Table - Dark Gray - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Seats 6
description: Treat your guests to the ultimate outdoor dining experience by using this chic and expansive outdoor Christopher Knight Home Nestor Rectangle Acacia Dining Table. Hewn from genuine acacia wood, its tastefully-slatted surface design and modern, closed legs will set the mood for suppertime at your place time and time again. Specially-treated wood gives this piece hardy wherewithal in the face of the elements and sun. This timelessly stylish dining table is broad enough for the whole family and then some, meaning nobody will be excluded from the festivities.
